problem_statement: Andy's team generates standard proposals but Andy manually customizes each. 70% revenue from existing clients — re-engagement is primary use case. Partner-dependent model at founder leverage limit.

engagement_tracks.name: Agentic Service Design
engagement_tracks.description: Encode Andy's proposal methodology so team can generate client-contextualized proposals without him

engagement_tracks.name: Contractor Coordination
engagement_tracks.description: Help Andy track buyer ideas (esp. Lilly contact) and make embedded contractors more proactive on pipeline execution

success_signals: Proposals go out without Andy that fully capture his methodology and the client's TRUTH
Capacity recapture: 3-12 senior hours per deal
open_questions: Contractor names and Lilly contact name (get in Discovery)
